metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace — an agent-teams-aware advanced software-engineering base set. Multi-agent orchestration and parallel code review (council, exodia, elegance-pipeline, feature-dev), cognitive amplification (metacognitive-guard), behavior-first test quality (mutation-minded-testing), plugin/skill evaluation (cc-plugin-eval), HTML output routing (html-effectiveness), commit-pinned NuGet source fetching (nuget-opensrc), and truth-drift / documentation auditing (derot).

plugins.name: metacognitive-guard
plugins.description: Cognitive amplification stack: epistemic hooks, competitive review, commit integrity checks, CI verification scripts, and deep-thinking agents.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Guided feature development with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, code review, and quality assurance.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Council using the Teams API: an Opus captain orchestrates a /deep-research dynamic workflow and an Opus synthesizer that reconcile via SendMessage across an agent team, an Opus clarity agent asks live follow-ups, and an Opus janitor flags bloat — reactive collaboration instead of fire-and-forget subagents.

plugins.name: exodia
plugins.description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration (9 commands + 2 skills: eight-gates, hades): fix, turbo-fix, fix-pipeline, tournament, mega-swarm, deep-think, batch-implement, red-blue-review, baryon-mode. Hades, eight-gates, and red-blue-review use Teams API for reactive collaboration.

plugins.name: elegance-pipeline
plugins.description: Code-elegance workflow: multi-agent pipeline (4 scouts, 2 judges, planner, verifier, gated implementer) plus a standalone code-simplifier agent for quick single-pass diff cleanups. Persistent state with stage gates.

plugins.name: mutation-minded-testing
plugins.description: Mutation-minded, behavior-first test quality. 4 agents (architecture reviewer, senior tester judge, expressive verifier improver, branch coverage implementer) + 4 skills. Coverage is a floor; kill power is the signal.

plugins.name: cc-plugin-eval
plugins.description: Claude-Code-native plugin and skill evaluator. Static analysis + token budgeting + benchmarking across the full Claude component surface (manifest, hooks, MCP, LSP, monitors, agents, marketplace, userConfig). Forked from openai/plugins plugin-eval (MIT) and rewritten for Claude Code conventions; complements skill-creator's per-skill LLM grading with whole-plugin scoring.

plugins.name: html-effectiveness
plugins.description: Routes agent output to single self-contained .html files based on Thariq Shihipar's html-effectiveness pattern catalog. 20 canonical patterns (triage board, status report, code review, design system, prompt tuner, etc.) with a data-driven decision tree so Claude picks the right pattern per task. Includes OTel semconv generator demo as concrete proof.

plugins.name: nuget-opensrc
plugins.description: Commit-pinned NuGet→GitHub source fetcher. Wraps opensrc with NuGet catalog metadata so coding agents grep the exact commit a package was built from, not whatever's on main. Ships a /nuget-opensrc command, an autonomous opensrc-research skill, and a Node CLI that refuses to silently fall back to projectUrl or default branch.

plugins.name: derot
plugins.description: Truth-drift auditor: find & fix comment/doc/CI/version/dependency rot that contradicts the actual code, with root + transitive verification (correct beats delete). Parallel read-only rot-scouts plus a dependency-rationalization analyst that questions sub-vs-parent and superseded packages (e.g. SemanticKernel vs Agents.AI).
